entries.title: Clarification Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to reduce the specific ambiguity, conflict, or missing input that is materially blocking the active task.

entries.title: Code Implementation Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to define the implementation approach and apply the requested code change while keeping the affected repository surfaces coherent.

entries.title: Code Review Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to evaluate a code change for correctness, regression risk, maintainability, standards alignment, and review completeness, then summarize evidence-backed findings clearly.

entries.title: Code Validation Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to define, execute, and assess the validation needed for a code change or target surface.

entries.title: Commit Closeout Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to evaluate commit readiness, prepare a repository-compliant commit message, and create the Git commit when requested.

entries.title: Core Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to load the minimum shared standards and instructions that apply across all routed workflow modules.

entries.title: Current-State Inspection Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to inspect the current repository, codebase, document set, or architecture surfaces relevant to the active task before recommendations, edits, or judgments are made.

entries.title: Documentation Generation Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to author a new repository document that is accurate, well-structured, correctly classified, and scoped to one primary standard, topic, or area without omitting materially distinct detail.

entries.title: Documentation-Implementation Reconciliation Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to compare current CLI or implementation behavior against companion documentation and machine-readable lookup surfaces so drift is found, classified, and resolved explicitly.

entries.title: Documentation Refresh Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to refresh and reconcile existing repository documentation or standards after the active scope and drift findings are known.

entries.title: Documentation Review Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to evaluate documentation or standards for accuracy, structure, operationalization, and cross-surface coherence, then summarize evidence-backed findings clearly.

entries.title: Domain Pack Integration Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to implement or refactor the reusable-core, host-runtime, and pack-runtime boundary so hosted packs integrate through explicit contracts instead of direct imports or hidden repository coupling.

entries.title: External Guidance Research Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to consult authoritative external guidance only when internal repository guidance is incomplete or the active task depends on version-sensitive, domain-specific, regulatory, standards-driven, or vendor-controlled behavior.

entries.title: Foundations Context Review Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to load the repository foundation documents that materially shape planning, design, or foundations-aware review work so the resulting artifact stays aligned with the repository's product model, design philosophy, standards posture, and technology direction.

entries.title: Governed Artifact Reconciliation Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to reconcile schema-backed governed artifacts with their companion schemas, examples, registries, indexes, loaders, validators, and lookup surfaces so artifact families stay internally coherent.

entries.title: Internal Context Review Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to identify the repository-specific standards, templates, workflows, ADRs, and canonical documents that should govern the active task before new local behavior is inferred.

entries.title: Pack Interface Validation Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to validate that a hosted pack publishes the required machine contracts, Python hooks, owned roots, and portability guarantees expected by reusable core and host composition.

entries.title: Reference Distillation Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to extract durable local guidance from external source material and map it cleanly to repository needs.

entries.title: Repository Assessment Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to assess an inventoried repository for coherence, authority alignment, freshness, maintainability, validation coverage, operational risk, and developer experience.

entries.title: Repository Inventory Review Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to inventory the repository's major surfaces, authority boundaries, execution paths, and review hotspots before deeper repository assessment begins.

entries.title: Repository Review Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to synthesize an existing repository review into a findings-first, evidence-backed report with remediation guidance and explicit stop-condition proof.

entries.title: Review Remediation Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to turn an existing review findings set into owning-surface fixes, aligned companion updates, and explicit validation proof without forcing a fresh broad review first.

entries.title: Review Remediation Loop Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to alternate seeded or fresh review findings with remediation passes until the chosen review comes back clean, only blocked, or explicitly iteration-capped.

entries.title: Shared Core Refresh Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to refresh shared `core/` from one WatchTower-style repository into another repository through the engineering shared-core extract path instead of raw copy or customer-safe bundle export.

entries.title: Standards Alignment Review Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to audit and remediate standards, references, templates, and governed authoring surfaces so published governance contracts stay current, correctly owned, machine-enforced where practical, and aligned with implementation.

entries.title: Task Handoff Review Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to confirm that the active task output is coherent, handoff-ready, and accompanied by any needed related-surface updates, follow-up notes, or commit-closeout escalation.

entries.title: Task Scope Definition Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to define the task objective, scope boundary, and success conditions clearly enough that downstream workflow modules can execute without guessing.

entries.title: Test Suite Optimization Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to reduce test-runtime cost without dropping the active proof that the repository still needs.

entries.title: Validation Harness Review Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to audit and harden validators, validation suites, tests, regression harnesses, and coverage gaps so claimed protections fail closed and false-green behavior is detected and eliminated.

entries.title: Workflow System Review Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to audit the workflow system across shared and pack-owned roots so workflow modules, roles, routing tables, indexes, validators, and runtime query surfaces stay deterministic and aligned.

entries.title: Adversarial Reviewer Role
entries.summary: Use this role to apply a contradiction-oriented, false-green-resistant review lens so repository audits challenge claimed protections, prove adjacent boundaries, and surface issues that a proportional default review might leave untested.

entries.title: Workflow Steward Role
entries.summary: Use this role to apply a workflow-governance lens so workflow-system audits and repairs preserve route determinism, minimal-context loading, validator and index parity, and same-change companion updates.

entries.title: Acceptance and Evidence Reconciliation Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to reconcile initiative-local acceptance IDs, acceptance contracts, validation evidence, validator references, and the traceability layer for one traced initiative.

entries.title: Decision Capture Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to analyze viable options and record a durable repository decision with rationale, status, and downstream impacts.

entries.title: Design Record Planning Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to define design options, recommend a technical design, and capture the guardrails that `design_record.md` must hand off to `implementation_slice.md`.

entries.title: GitHub Task Sync Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to publish initiative-local live task records to GitHub issues and optional project items while preserving live plan task state as the authoritative source of truth.

entries.title: Implementation Slice Planning Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to turn approved initiative inputs into an actionable `implementation_slice.md` with a work breakdown, validation strategy, and delivery sequence.

entries.title: Initiative Brief Authoring Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to turn a scoped planning request into a review-ready `initiative_brief.md` that defines the package before design and execution begin.

entries.title: Initiative Closeout Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to mark one traced initiative as completed, superseded, cancelled, or abandoned while keeping the traceability index, initiative coordination view, and mirrored family trackers aligned.

entries.title: Task Lifecycle Management Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to create, update, split, unblock, or close initiative-local live task records while keeping the live task index, initiative coordination view, and human companion trackers aligned.

entries.title: Task Phase Transition Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to hand a task from one owner, phase, or execution stage to the next, including explicit successor tasks, without losing context, dependencies, or trace links.

entries.title: Traceability Reconciliation Workflow
entries.summary: Use this workflow to reconcile traced planning and governance artifacts with their companion human trackers, initiative coordination views, family-specific indexes, and unified traceability joins so durable links do not drift silently.

entries.title: Planning Author Role
entries.summary: Use this role to orchestrate end-to-end planning authoring so initiative intake, technical design, and implementation slicing hand off cleanly without duplicating module logic or carrying unresolved ambiguity forward.

entries.title: Task Coordinator Role
entries.summary: Use this role to orchestrate live task creation, phase transitions, and optional GitHub mirroring so execution state changes stay bounded, queryable, and synchronized across task surfaces.

entries.title: Traceability Steward Role
entries.summary: Use this role to orchestrate trace-bearing decisions, traceability reconciliation, acceptance or evidence coverage, and initiative closeout so traced planning state stays explicit from decision through terminal outcome.
